description_long: This is a semi-automatic rifle with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, featuring a long, slender metal barrel. The receiver and magazine are constructed from dark metal, with the magazine being a curved, detachable box type. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights, and the muzzle appears to lack any additional device such as a suppressor or flash hider. The trigger guard and trigger are visible, and the rifle is supported by a simple bipod stand. The overall finish is utilitarian, with visible wood grain and a matte metal surface, suggesting durability and practical use in urban environments.
description: A semi-automatic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, curved metal magazine, and iron sights, finished in matte wood and metal. Supported by a bipod, it has a utilitarian, durable appearance.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs, and a glimpse of the wooden stock behind.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the wooden stock, curved magazine, iron sights, and the bipod supporting the rifle.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and bipod.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile displays the same features as the left, with the trigger and magazine clearly visible.
